messages.content: 写一个宠物寄养的vue界面
界面不是很美观，可以通过element-ui搞美观些
宽度用百分数来代替，完整修正代码

为了使用百分数代替固定宽度，可以将`.pet-boarding-form`的`max-width`改为百分比，例如`80%`，这样你的组件在不同屏幕上对应的大小会根据容器的宽度动态调整。这里是修正后的代码： ```vue ``` 在这个样式里： - `width: 80%` 确保组件在其容器内占据80%的宽度，这对于响应式布局来说是一个好的起点。 - `max-width: 800px` 提供一个最大宽度限制，当屏幕很大的时候，表单不会变得太宽。 - `margin: 0 auto` 让表单在其父容器居中显示。 这将帮助你在不同大小的设备上保持界面的一致性和美观性。
外观不是很美观，调整一下，完整代码
按照这个前端编写sql语句

CREATE TABLE pet_boarding (
    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    pet_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    owner_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    start_date DATE NOT NULL,
    end_date DATE NOT NULL,
    special_needs TEXT
);根据这个sql编写java实体类，再根据<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?>
<!DOCTYPE mapper
        PUBLIC "-//mybatis.org//DTD Mapper 3.0//EN"
        "http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-mapper.dtd">
<mapper namespace="com.ruoyi.web.mapper.CartMapper">

    <!-- Result Map for Cart -->
    <resultMap id="CartResult" type="com.ruoyi.web.domain.Cart">
        <id property="cartId" column="cart_id" />
        <result property="userId" column="user_id" />
        <result property="productId" column="product_id" />
        <result property="quantity" column="quantity" />
        <result property="addedTime" column="added_time" />
    </resultMap>

    <!-- Select Cart by CartId -->
    <select id="selectCartById" parameterType="Integer" resultMap="CartResult">
        SELECT cart_id, user_id, product_id, quantity, added_time
        FROM cart
        WHERE cart_id = #{cartId}
    </select>

    <!-- Select All Cart Items for a User -->
    <select id="selectCartByUserId" parameterType="Integer" resultMap="CartResult">
        SELECT cart_id, user_id, product_id, quantity, added_time
        FROM cart
        WHERE user_id = #{userId}
    </select>

    <!-- Insert Cart Item -->
    <insert id="insertCart" parameterType="com.ruoyi.web.domain.Cart" useGeneratedKeys="true" keyProperty="cartId">
        INSERT INTO cart (user_id, product_id, quantity, added_time)
        VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, NOW())
    </insert>

    <!-- Update Cart Item -->
    <update id="updateCart" parameterType="com.ruoyi.web.domain.Cart">
        UPDATE cart
        <set>
            <if test="userId != null">user_id = #{userId},</if>
            <if test="productId != null">product_id = #{productId},</if>
            <if test="quantity != null">quantity = #{quantity},</if>
        </set>
        WHERE cart_id = #{cartId}
    </update>

    <!-- Delete Cart Item by CartId -->
    <delete id="deleteCartById" parameterType="Integer">
        DELETE FROM cart WHERE cart_id = #{cartId}
    </delete>

    <delete id="deleteCartByPid" parameterType="map">
        DELETE FROM cart WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND user_id = #{userId}
    </delete>

    <!-- Delete All Cart Items for a User -->
    <delete id="deleteCartByUserId" parameterType="Integer">
        DELETE FROM cart WHERE user_id = #{userId}
    </delete>

</mapper>这个编写xml

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?>
<!DOCTYPE mapper
        PUBLIC "-//mybatis.org//DTD Mapper 3.0//EN"
        "http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-mapper.dtd">
<mapper namespace="com.ruoyi.web.mapper.PetBoardingMapper">

    <!-- Result Map for PetBoarding -->
    <resultMap id="PetBoardingResult" type="com.ruoyi.web.domain.PetBoarding">
        <id property="id" column="id"/>
        <result property="petName" column="pet_name"/>
        <result property="ownerName" column="owner_name"/>
        <result property="startDate" column="start_date"/>
        <result property="endDate" column="end_date"/>
        <result property="specialNeeds" column="special_needs"/>
    </resultMap>

    <!-- Select by Id -->
    <select id="selectPetBoardingById" parameterType="Integer" resultMap="PetBoardingResult">
        SELECT id, pet_name, owner_name, start_date, end_date, special_needs
        FROM pet_boarding
        WHERE id = #{id}
    </select>

    <!-- Select All Pet Boardings -->
    <select id="selectAllPetBoardings" resultMap="PetBoardingResult">
        SELECT id, pet_name, owner_name, start_date, end_date, special_needs
        FROM pet_boarding
    </select>

    <!-- Insert Pet Boarding -->
    <insert id="insertPetBoarding" parameterType="com.ruoyi.web.domain.PetBoarding" useGeneratedKeys="true" keyProperty="id">
        INSERT INTO pet_boarding (pet_name, owner_name, start_date, end_date, special_needs)
        VALUES (#{petName}, #{ownerName}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{specialNeeds})
    </insert>

    <!-- Update Pet Boarding -->
    <update id="updatePetBoarding" parameterType="com.ruoyi.web.domain.PetBoarding">
        UPDATE pet_boarding
        <set>
            <if test="petName != null">pet_name = #{petName},</if>
            <if test="ownerName != null">owner_name = #{ownerName},</if>
            <if test="startDate != null">start_date = #{startDate},</if>
            <if test="endDate != null">end_date = #{endDate},</if>
            <if test="specialNeeds != null">special_needs = #{specialNeeds},</if>
        </set>
        WHERE id = #{id}
    </update>

    <!-- Delete Pet Boarding by Id -->
    <delete id="deletePetBoardingById" parameterType="Integer">
        DELETE FROM pet_boarding WHERE id = #{id}
    </delete>

</mapper>编写PetBoardingMapper接口，和IPetBoardingService接口和IPetBoardingServiceImpl实现类

它的request的请求代码如下import store from '@/store' import config from '@/config' import { getToken } from '@/utils/auth' import errorCode from '@/utils/errorCode' import { toast, showConfirm, tansParams } from '@/utils/common' let timeout = 10000 const baseUrl = config.baseUrl const request = config => { // 是否需要设置 token const isToken = (config.headers || {}).isToken === false config.header = config.header || {} if (getToken() && !isToken) { config.header['Authorization'] = 'Bearer ' + getToken() } // get请求映射params参数 if (config.params) { let url = config.url + '?' + tansParams(config.params) url = url.slice(0, -1) config.url = url } return new Promise((resolve, reject) => { uni.request({ method: config.method || 'get', timeout: config.timeout || timeout, url: config.baseUrl || baseUrl + config.url, data: config.data, header: config.header, dataType: 'json' }).then(response => { let [error, res] = response if (error) { toast('后端接口连接异常') reject('后端接口连接异常') return } const code = res.data.code || 200 const msg = errorCode[code] || res.data.msg || errorCode['default'] if (code === 401) { showConfirm('登录状态已过期，您可以继续留在该页面，或者重新登录?').then(res => { if (res.confirm) { store.dispatch('LogOut').then(res => { uni.reLaunch({ url: '/pages/login' }) }) } }) reject('无效的会话，或者会话已过期，请重新登录。') } else if (code === 500) { toast(msg) reject('500') } else if (code !== 200) { toast(msg) reject(code) } resolve(res.data) }) .catch(error => { let { message } = error if (message === 'Network Error') { message = '后端接口连接异常' } else if (message.includes('timeout')) { message = '系统接口请求超时' } else if (message.includes('Request failed with status code')) { message = '系统接口' + message.substr(message.length - 3) + '异常' } toast(message) reject(error) }) }) } export default request，和springboot接口配合，完整代码
